Class UserCookies

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.jUser.controller.UserCookies
@Component public class UserCookies extends Object
Service component for managing user cookie/session records in the database.

This class handles user session management through cookies, tracking login sessions across different devices with support for "remember me" functionality.

Key functionality:

  • Add new session cookies for users
  • Fetch session cookies by user, device, and session key
  • Check if session key exists in database
  • Save cookie records individually or in batch

  • Constructor Details

    • UserCookies

      public UserCookies()

  • Method Details

    • add

      public UserCookiesTBL add(UserLoginTBL user, DeviceInformationTBL device, String sessionKey, boolean rememberLogin)
      Adds a new session cookie for a user on a specific device.

      The session expiration is set based on the rememberLogin parameter: 30 days if rememberLogin is true, 1 day otherwise.

      Parameters:
      user - the user to create the session for
      device - the device the session is created on
      sessionKey - the session key for the cookie
      rememberLogin - whether to remember the login for 30 days
      Returns:
      the saved cookie record with generated ID

    • fetch

      public Optional<UserCookiesTBL> fetch(UserLoginTBL user, DeviceInformationTBL device, String sessionKey, boolean active)
      Fetches a session cookie by user, device, session key, and active status.
      Parameters:
      user - the user to fetch the cookie for
      device - the device to fetch the cookie for
      sessionKey - the session key to fetch
      active - the active status to filter by
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the cookie record if found, empty otherwise

    • update

      @Deprecated public void update(UserCookiesTBL cookie)
      Deprecated.
      Use save() instead which operates on the data field
      Updates a cookie record in the database.
      Parameters:
      cookie - the cookie record to update

    • checkIfKeyExisitsInTheDatabase

      public boolean checkIfKeyExisitsInTheDatabase(UserLoginTBL userData, DeviceInformationTBL device, String sessionkey)
      Checks if a session key exists in the database for a specific user and device.
      Parameters:
      userData - the user to check against
      device - the device to check against
      sessionkey - the session key to check
      Returns:
      true if the session key does not exist, false if it exists

    • save

      public void save()
      Saves the current cookie record from the data field to the database.

      The saved entity (with generated ID) is stored back in the data field.

    • saveAll

      public void saveAll()
      Saves all cookie records in the dataList to the database in a batch operation.

      After saving, the list is cleared and repopulated with the saved entities (including any generated IDs).
